member.name: M:GTA.World.GetNearbyBlips(GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,GTA.BlipSprite[])
member.summary:
Gets an array of all
s in a given region in the World.
member.param:
The position to check the
against.

The maximum distance from the
to detect
s.

The blip types to include, leave blank to get all
s.
